notes: Quality/画質 badge moved into the camera action row (2026-06). The 🖥 perf/quality chip used to float alone in the top-right corner; it now sits at the RIGHT END of the camera button row (🏠リセット…AR 画質) so the top controls read as one group, on every device. Desktop / iPad-landscape / phone-landscape show it inline at the row's right end; iPad portrait wraps the row to two rows (width adapts to iPad mini vs Pro); phone portrait keeps it just under the row's right end (no inline room). The 画質 dropdown still anchors under it. Builds on v0.0.9 phone/fullscreen polish.
